label: The Gloam Reliquary
description: The Gloam Reliquary serves as a regulated shop within Cyrenth Bastion-City’s armored arcades, its frontage set behind a pressure-sealed vestibule and a heavy shutter of void-black adamantine. Display niches are cut into ferrocrete walls like a munitorum catalogue, each compartment marked with stenciled lot codes and purity seals beneath cold lumen strips. The air carries the antiseptic tang of decontamination agents, and a recessed counter is screened by mesh and armored glass to enforce quarantine protocol. Auspex housings and tamper-evident locks dominate the fittings, reflecting a commerce shaped by siege logistics and contamination control.
